text.title: Renovate Auto-Merge + AI Handoff Failure Modes
text.summary: Three antipatterns observed in real Renovate + agent-handoff deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Renovate auto-merged a major bump; call-sites broke; downstream deploy failed.
antipattern.fix: Set major automerge=false + label `agent-fixable` so the coding agent rewrites call-sites first.

antipattern.symptom: Coding agent token spend tripled; agent assigned to every Renovate PR including patch bumps.
antipattern.root-cause: Handoff workflow triggered on all labels instead of `agent-fixable` only.

antipattern.symptom: 0.x package minor bump auto-merged; semver-breaking change broke prod.
antipattern.fix: Add packageRule {matchUpdateTypes: [minor], matchCurrentVersion: /^0/, labels: [agent-fixable], automerge: false}.
